summary: Ukrainian forces have struck key logistical bridges on the occupied southern corridor, while Russian forces report ongoing small‑arms engagements across the eastern front. Multiple UAV incursions were observed over Kharkiv, Sumy and Zaporizhzhia regions. Both sides continue missile and drone attacks on infrastructure deep within each other's territory.
key_points: Ukrainian artillery destroyed two bridges on the newly built R‑280 road near Chongar, disrupting a major Russian land corridor from Rostov to Sevastopol (Source: @DeepStateUA/23569).
Russian forces reported small‑arms battles advancing up to 900 m in 21 sectors of the Sumy direction, including villages Ivolzhanske and Novaya Sich (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
UAV activity was reported near Balabine in Zaporizhzhia and near Shalhyn in Sumy, indicating continued aerial threats to regional infrastructure (Source: @eRadarrua/96191).
A Russian FPV drone wounded a civilian in Dorogoshch, Belgorod region, and caused injuries in Krasnaya Yaruga settlements (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Ukrainian missile strike hit the Novokuybyshevsk oil refinery in Samara, causing a fire (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
UAV alerts warned residents of Kharkiv region to seek shelter as drones flew near Bogoduhiv and Krasnopavlivka (Source: @kpszsu/64799, @kpszsu/64768).
Ukrainian forces reported a UAV attack destroying eight drones en route to Moscow (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian forces have destroyed two bridges on the R‑280 corridor near Chongar, severely hampering Russian logistics (Source: @DeepStateUA/23569). Russian troops report ongoing small‑arms engagements across the Sumy sector, advancing up to 900 m in multiple villages (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805). UAV activity continues over Kharkiv, Sumy and Zaporizhzhia, prompting civilian alerts and air‑defence responses (Source: @eRadarrua/96191).

points: Ukrainian artillery targeted the newly constructed R‑280 road near Chongar, destroying two bridges that connect Rostov‑on‑Don with Sevastopol, aiming to cut the primary Russian supply line (Source: @DeepStateUA/23569).
Ukrainian forces launched a missile strike on the Novokuybyshevsk oil refinery in Samara, igniting a fire and disrupting fuel processing for Russian military logistics (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Eight Ukrainian UAVs heading toward Moscow were shot down, demonstrating active offensive drone operations deep into Russian airspace (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Ukrainian reports indicate UAV sightings over Zaporizhzhia near Balabine and over Sumy near Shalhyn, prompting local air‑defence alerts (Source: @eRadarrua/96191).
Russian forces reported small‑arms battles in the Sumy direction, advancing up to 900 m in 21 sectors, including villages Ivolzhanske, Pysarovka and Novaya Sich (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).

A Russian FPV drone strike wounded a civilian in Dorogoshch, Belgorod region, and caused severe injuries in Krasnaya Yaruga settlements, indicating continued use of drones for tactical strikes (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Russian authorities noted UAV activity over Kharkiv region, with drones flying near Bogoduhiv and Krasnopavlivka, prompting civilian shelter warnings (Source: @kpszsu/64799, @kpszsu/64768).

Russian reports from the Kherson region listed four wounded civilians in Skadovsk, Velyka Kardashynka, Velyky Kopany and Kalanchak, reflecting ongoing conflict impact on civilian populations (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).

In the Sumy sector, Russian assault troops of the Army Group "North" engaged in small‑arms battles across multiple villages, with reported advances of up to 900 m in several locations (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Ukrainian UAV attacks damaged eight districts' power supplies during nighttime operations, affecting civilian infrastructure in the eastern region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Ukrainian forces reported ongoing combat near Kazacha Lopan, a major logistics hub in Kharkiv region, indicating pressure on supply lines (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Ukrainian reports mention forest fighting near Petro‑Ivanovka in the Velyky Burluk direction, showing continued low‑intensity engagements (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
No explicit northern front operational details were present in the sourced messages.
Ukrainian artillery destroyed two bridges on the R‑280 corridor near Chongar, a critical southern supply route for Russian forces (Source: @DeepStateUA/23569).
Ukrainian UAV activity was reported over Zaporizhzhia, threatening regional infrastructure and prompting air‑defence alerts (Source: @eRadarrua/96191).
Russian logistics from Crimea face increased difficulty due to bridge disruptions and ongoing Ukrainian strikes on rear‑area targets (Source: @DeepStateUA/23569).
Ukrainian forces continue to target energy infrastructure in the Zaporozhye region, causing damage during raids (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Ukrainian UAVs intercepted eight drones en route to Moscow, indicating active offensive air operations (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Russian FPV drones conducted strikes in Belgorod region, wounding civilians in Dorogoshch and Krasnaya Yaruga (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
UAV alerts over Kharkiv region (Bogoduhiv, Krasnopavlivka) prompted civilian sheltering, reflecting persistent aerial threat (Source: @kpszsu/64799, @kpszsu/64768).
Ukrainian missile strike on Novokuybyshevsk oil refinery in Samara caused a fire, demonstrating long‑range strike capability (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).

key_developments: Ukrainian artillery destroyed two bridges on the newly built R‑280 road near Chongar, disrupting a major Russian land corridor from Rostov‑on‑Don to Sevastopol (Source: @DeepStateUA/23569).
Russian forces reported small‑arms battles advancing up to 900 m in 21 sectors of the Sumy direction, including villages Ivolzhanske and Novaya Sich (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Eight Ukrainian UAVs heading toward Moscow were shot down, showing active deep‑strike drone operations (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Ukrainian missile strike ignited a fire at the Novokuybyshevsk oil refinery in Samara, impacting Russian fuel processing (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
UAV sightings were reported near Balabine in Zaporizhzhia and near Shalhyn in Sumy, prompting regional air‑defence alerts (Source: @eRadarrua/96191).
Russian FPV drones wounded civilians in Dorogoshch and caused severe injuries in Krasnaya Yaruga, Belgorod region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
Four civilians were wounded in the Kherson region (Skadovsk, Velyka Kardashynka, Velyky Kopany, Kalanchak) amid ongoing hostilities (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30805).
sections.threat_assessment: Ukrainian forces are intensifying strikes on Russian logistical arteries, notably the R‑280 bridge corridor, which threatens supply lines to occupied territories. Russian small‑arms engagements in the Sumy sector indicate a focus on incremental territorial gains, while UAV and missile attacks demonstrate both sides' capability to project force deep into rear areas. Civilian populations remain at risk from drone strikes and infrastructure attacks, sustaining a high‑intensity conflict environment.
sections.regional_response: Local authorities in Zaporizhzhia have issued temporary transport bans for organized groups of children, reflecting heightened security concerns (Source: @tass_agency/380132). Ukrainian regional commands continue to issue UAV alerts, urging civilians to seek shelter, indicating adaptive civil defence measures. Russian forces maintain pressure on eastern fronts while attempting to mitigate logistical disruptions caused by bridge destructions.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of UAV flight paths over Kharkiv and Sumy regions should be intensified to anticipate potential strike vectors. Bridge damage assessments on the R‑280 corridor are critical for forecasting Russian logistical constraints. Continued surveillance of Russian FPV drone activity in Belgorod can provide insight into low‑altitude attack tactics. Energy infrastructure attacks in Samara and Zaporozhye suggest a strategic focus on disrupting fuel and power supplies.
